student_map.structure: Absolute positioning of nodes (Islands) connected by SVG paths (Bezier curves). Background is a repeating water pattern or generated SVG waves.
student_map.node_style: Circular or irregular 'island' shapes, 64px-96px size, bouncing hover effect.
student_map.spacing: Loose, scattered to mimic a real map archipelago.

teacher_dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation, Top KPI cards, Main Data Table/Heatmap.
teacher_dashboard.density: Compact. Use 'h-8' or 'h-10' for table rows. Minimize whitespace to show more data.

MapNode.description: Represents a skill (TEKS standard). Visual state changes based on status (Locked, Open, Mastered).

states.open: Full color, bouncing animation, pulsing ring.
states.mastered: Green checkmark badge, gold border, star rating visible.

images.background_texture: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618949940755-36972997808a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80 (Use with overlay/blur for texture if needed, primarily rely on CSS patterns)

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text legibility, use solid backgrounds with high contrast.
For the student map, ensure 'islands' are clickable areas (min 44x44px).
Teacher dashboard must not require scrolling for key metrics (Keep 'Above the fold').
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Achievements for kids, System alerts for teachers).
Use Shadcn UI components for Teacher Dashboard interactions (Dialog, Dropdown, Table).
Custom build the Student Map using relative/absolute positioning within a specialized container.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup Tailwind theme colors for 'student' and 'teacher' modes.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create the 'StudentLayout' (Adventure Theme) and 'TeacherLayout' (Admin Theme) as separate wrapper components.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the 'SkillGraph' data structure (20 nodes with dependencies) in a mock database/JSON.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the 'MapCanvas' component. Use an SVG layer for drawing connecting lines (paths) between absolute positioned div nodes (Islands).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the 'TeacherDashboard' using Shadcn Table. Mock data for 15-20 students.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Add the 'StudentDetail' view for teachers to drill down into error patterns.
